pages.title: BeagleHub — Your Complete Beagle Dog Resource
pages.description: BeagleHub is your go-to guide for everything Beagle — breed info, health tips, training advice, nutrition, grooming, and puppy care all in one place.
pages.og_title: BeagleHub | The Complete Beagle Dog Resource
pages.og_description: Discover expert Beagle care guides covering health, training, nutrition, grooming, and more. Built for Beagle owners by Beagle lovers.

pages.title: Beagle Breed Overview — History, Temperament & Characteristics
pages.description: Learn everything about the Beagle breed — from ancient scent-hound origins and AKC standards to temperament, size, lifespan, and what makes Beagles unique.
pages.og_title: Beagle Breed Overview | History, Traits & AKC Standards
pages.og_description: Explore the full Beagle breed profile: origins, physical traits, temperament, AKC standards, and what to expect as a Beagle owner.

pages.title: Beagle Diet & Nutrition — Feeding Guides by Age & Weight
pages.description: Complete Beagle nutrition guide: age-based feeding schedules, best food choices, foods to avoid, weight management tips, and portion sizes for every life stage.
pages.og_title: Beagle Diet & Nutrition | Feeding Schedules & Food Guides
pages.og_description: Learn what to feed your Beagle at every life stage — puppy, adult, and senior — plus which foods are dangerous and how to prevent obesity.

pages.title: Beagle Training Guide — Obedience, House Training & Behavior Tips
pages.description: Master Beagle training with our complete guide covering obedience basics, house training, leash manners, recall, and how to manage common behavioral challenges.
pages.og_title: Beagle Training Guide | Obedience, Leash & Behavior Tips
pages.og_description: Step-by-step Beagle training techniques for obedience, house training, leash manners, and fixing problem behaviors like baying and escape attempts.

pages.title: Beagle Health Guide — Common Conditions, Vaccines & Vet Care
pages.description: Complete Beagle health guide: common breed-specific conditions, vaccination schedule, vet visit frequency, preventive care, and emergency warning signs every owner needs.
pages.og_title: Beagle Health Guide | Conditions, Vaccines & Preventive Care
pages.og_description: Keep your Beagle healthy with our expert guide covering common Beagle illnesses, vaccination timelines, routine vet care, and when to seek emergency help.

pages.title: Beagle Grooming Guide — Coat, Bathing, Nails, Ears & Dental Care
pages.description: Step-by-step Beagle grooming guide covering coat brushing, bathing frequency, nail trimming, ear cleaning, and dental care to keep your Beagle healthy and clean.
pages.og_title: Beagle Grooming Guide | Coat, Bathing, Nails & Ear Care
pages.og_description: Learn how to groom your Beagle at home — from brushing the short dense coat and bathing, to nail trims, ear cleaning, and preventing dental disease.

pages.title: Beagle Puppy Care — Bringing Home Your New Puppy & First-Year Guide
pages.description: Your complete Beagle puppy care guide: what to prepare before bringing your puppy home, the critical first week, socialization windows, crate training, and first-year milestones.
pages.og_title: Beagle Puppy Care | First Week, Socialization & Crate Training
pages.og_description: Everything new Beagle puppy owners need — from puppy-proofing your home and the first night to socialization, crate training, and the first-year development timeline.
